name: use-nudges invalidates query with possibly-undefined profileId
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L1-08d] invalidateQueries keyed on _data.profileId which can be undefined, missing the real-id key. Fix: prefix-invalidate or guard.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: useNudges invalidates ['nudges','unread', _data.profileId] after read mutations, but _data.profileId is copied from activeProfile at mutation time and can be undefined, so the invalidation may miss the real active-profile cache key. Variants: (a) mark-one-read invalidates the active profile's unread nudges query, (b) mark-all-read invalidates the active profile's unread nudges query, (c) no active profile avoids issuing a misleading undefined-profile invalidation. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/hooks/use-nudges.test.ts fails without the fix and passes with it, asserting invalidateQueries targets the real profile-scoped unread key or a safe prefix/predicate for both read mutations.
